_comment: Synthetic Teams per-program channel posts for the B.B.A. program review. Used for the program-review status (channel+meeting) multi-signal question.

teams_messages.author: PPL-003
teams_messages.text: Program-review update: the course-sequence change is conditionally approved, not yet signed off. I need the catalog comparison and alignment with the new assessment plan before I take it to a vote.

teams_messages.author: PPL-001
teams_messages.text: Status of the B.B.A. program review: assessment plan approved by curriculum committee; course-sequence change conditionally approved by program-review committee pending catalog comparison; two assurance-of-learning actions still open. Net: on track for the site visit if we close the AoL loop and get the sign-off vote.

teams_messages.author: PPL-005
teams_messages.text: I'll close the written-communication assurance-of-learning loop as soon as Ravi's assessment data pull lands Friday. That's the last curriculum-side item.

teams_messages.author: PPL-001
teams_messages.text: Reminder: the accreditation tracker is our single source of truth for outstanding site-visit tasks. I'll create tracked tasks for each open AoL action and the sign-off.

teams_messages.author: PPL-007
teams_messages.text: Management department is ready to support whatever the committees need for the site visit. No open items on our side beyond the two AoL actions already logged.
